Platform Capabilities

Everything you need to orchestrate autonomous AI agents

✦

Personal Dashboard

Unified view across all Heady services — your command center for AI workflows, memory, and orchestration.

🧠

3D AI Memory

Vector-spatial context that remembers everything with O(log n) retrieval via octree partitioning.

☁️

Cloud Runtime

Managed execution environment for 20 autonomous AI nodes with self-healing infrastructure.

🔗

Cross-Vertical Sync

Seamlessly share context between all Heady apps — one memory space, infinite projections.
